steps.t: Lake-town is to the north-east of Loeglond. Nembadeth sent you to speak with Várthrek, a guard at the entrance to Lake-town.
Lake-town is to the north-east of Loeglond. Nembadeth sent you to speak with Várthrek, a guard at the entrance to Lake-town.
Várthrek told you to ask the townsfolk of Lake-town for tidings of Karazgar.
Várthrek told you to ask the townsfolk of Lake-town for tidings of Karazgar.
Várthrek told you to ask the townsfolk of Lake-town for tidings of Karazgar.
Kólfith is on the lower level of Lake-town, just above the water.
Authi, the dwarf you befriended in the Dragonbone Inn, is just to the north of the tavern.
